productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Casual Black Shoes
description: A sporty take on the classic derby shoe, this sneaker from numero uno for the cosmopolitan male is an off-duty essential. Outer with powerful stitch detailing, styling the shoe into a sporty silhouette of perfection. These disctinctive shoes add an authentic sportswear accent to your ensemble. Wear this with a sweatshirt, jeans and a tee or a shirt. This NU pair cuts a dash to downtime dressing, while lending your outfit a relaxed vibe. Upper Synthetic leather upper with stitch detailing along the midfoot and appliqued branding on the lateral side Central lacing systemwith a padded tongue Fabric mesh lining Haul loop at the collar Outsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel Midsole EVA midsole Outsole TPU outsole with patterned lugs Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
